questionTitle: Which application do you want to make?

challengeRentIncrease.label: Challenge the rent increase proposed in a landlord's notice proposing a new rent
challengeRentIncrease.hint: Including if you also want to challenge the legal validity of the landlord's notice

challengeExcessiveRent.label: Challenge my rent as excessive within the first 6 months of the tenancy

applicationType.required: Select which application you want to make
